sentences.en: The lookalike audience performed 40% better than our broad targeting.
sentences.zh: 相似人群的表现比宽泛定向好了40%。

sentences.en: We should sunset the referral bonus since the fraud rate is climbing.
sentences.zh: 我们应该下线推荐奖励，因为欺诈率在攀升。

sentences.en: The top-of-funnel metrics look healthy, but mid-funnel drop-off is alarming.
sentences.zh: 漏斗顶部指标看起来健康，但中段流失令人担忧。

sentences.en: Content marketing generates compounding returns over a longer time horizon.
sentences.zh: 内容营销在更长的时间维度上产生复合回报。

sentences.en: We need a dedicated growth engineer to build and maintain our experimentation platform.
sentences.zh: 我们需要一个专职增长工程师来搭建和维护实验平台。

example.en: Lookalike audiences are built from your highest-value customer profiles.
example.zh: 相似人群基于你最高价值的客户画像来构建。

example.en: We will sunset the legacy rewards program at the end of this quarter.
example.zh: 我们将在本季度末下线旧版奖励计划。

example.en: The biggest drop-off happens between account creation and first deposit.
example.zh: 最大的流失发生在账户创建和首次入金之间。

example.en: SEO delivers compounding traffic that grows without additional spend.
example.zh: SEO带来无需额外投入就能增长的复合流量。

example.en: A culture of experimentation encourages teams to test bold ideas.
example.zh: 实验文化鼓励团队测试大胆的想法。

sentences.en: The tech debt backlog is slowing down our ability to ship new features.
sentences.zh: 技术债积压正在拖慢我们交付新功能的能力。

sentences.en: We implemented server-side rendering to improve the initial page load speed.
sentences.zh: 我们实现了服务端渲染来提升首屏加载速度。

sentences.en: The accessibility audit revealed 23 critical issues on the trading page.
sentences.zh: 无障碍审计在交易页面发现了23个严重问题。

sentences.en: Our uptime SLA guarantees 99.95% availability for trading hours.
sentences.zh: 我们的正常运行时间SLA保证交易时段99.95%的可用性。

sentences.en: The product spec needs sign-off from both engineering and compliance.
sentences.zh: 产品需求文档需要工程团队和合规团队共同签字确认。

example.en: Ignoring tech debt now will cost three times more to fix later.
example.zh: 现在忽视技术债，以后修复的成本将是三倍。

example.en: Client-side rendering shifts the computational load to the user's device.
example.zh: 客户端渲染将计算负载转移到用户设备上。

example.en: Accessibility improvements benefit all users, not just those with disabilities.
example.zh: 无障碍改进惠及所有用户，而不仅仅是残障人士。

example.en: We achieved 99.99% uptime in the last quarter.
example.zh: 上季度我们实现了99.99%的正常运行时间。

example.en: Legal sign-off is required before any public-facing feature goes live.
example.zh: 任何面向公众的功能上线前都需要法务签字确认。

sentences.en: The company announced a secondary offering to fund its expansion plans.
sentences.zh: 该公司宣布二次发行以资助其扩张计划。

sentences.en: Book value per share has been steadily increasing over the past five years.
sentences.zh: 每股账面价值在过去五年中稳步增长。

sentences.en: The analyst downgraded the stock from buy to hold citing execution risk.
sentences.zh: 分析师以执行风险为由将该股从买入下调至持有。

sentences.en: Operating leverage is kicking in as revenue scales faster than fixed costs.
sentences.zh: 随着收入增速超过固定成本，经营杠杆效应正在显现。

sentences.en: The rights issue was fully subscribed, showing strong investor confidence.
sentences.zh: 供股获全额认购，显示出投资者的强烈信心。

example.en: The secondary offering diluted existing shareholders by 8%.
example.zh: 二次发行使现有股东被稀释了8%。

example.en: The stock is trading below book value, which may signal undervaluation.
example.zh: 该股股价低于账面价值，可能意味着被低估。

example.en: The downgrade triggered a 5% sell-off in pre-market trading.
example.zh: 评级下调引发了盘前交易5%的抛售。

example.en: High operating leverage means small revenue gains drive large profit increases.
example.zh: 高经营杠杆意味着小幅收入增长能推动大幅利润增加。

example.en: Existing shareholders have the right to participate in the rights issue at a discount.
example.zh: 现有股东有权以折扣价参与供股。

sentences.en: The key result should be measurable and within the team's direct control.
sentences.zh: 关键结果应该是可衡量的，并且在团队的直接控制范围内。

sentences.en: We lost two senior engineers this quarter due to lack of career growth paths.
sentences.zh: 本季度我们流失了两名高级工程师，原因是缺乏职业成长路径。

sentences.en: The hiring bar should not drop just because we are under time pressure.
sentences.zh: 不能因为时间紧迫就降低招聘标准。

sentences.en: I noticed you have been consistently delivering ahead of schedule this sprint.
sentences.zh: 我注意到这个冲刺你一直在提前交付。

sentences.en: The decision matrix helps us evaluate trade-offs objectively.
sentences.zh: 决策矩阵帮助我们客观地评估取舍。

example.en: Every OKR must have measurable key results with clear targets.
example.zh: 每个OKR都必须有可衡量的、目标明确的关键结果。

example.en: High attrition in the engineering team is a red flag for culture issues.
example.zh: 工程团队的高流失率是文化问题的危险信号。

example.en: Maintaining a high hiring bar is essential for long-term team quality.
example.zh: 保持高招聘标准对长期团队质量至关重要。

example.en: Every product decision involves a trade-off between speed and quality.
example.zh: 每个产品决策都涉及速度与质量之间的取舍。

example.en: We use a weighted decision matrix to rank vendor proposals.
example.zh: 我们使用加权决策矩阵来对供应商方案进行排序。

sentences.en: The platform play creates a two-sided marketplace with strong lock-in effects.
sentences.zh: 平台策略创建了一个具有强锁定效应的双边市场。

sentences.en: We underestimated the switching cost for users migrating from competitor apps.
sentences.zh: 我们低估了用户从竞品迁移的切换成本。

sentences.en: A bottom-up market sizing approach gives a more conservative but realistic estimate.
sentences.zh: 自下而上的市场测算方法给出了更保守但更现实的估计。

sentences.en: The adjacency expansion into wealth management is a natural next step.
sentences.zh: 向财富管理的邻接扩张是自然的下一步。

sentences.en: We must differentiate on service quality since pricing is becoming commoditized.
sentences.zh: 由于价格正在商品化，我们必须在服务质量上形成差异化。

example.en: Data portability reduces lock-in and gives users more freedom.
example.zh: 数据可迁移性降低了锁定效应，给用户更多自由。

example.en: High switching costs make it harder for competitors to poach your users.
example.zh: 高切换成本使竞争对手更难挖走你的用户。

example.en: Bottom-up analysis starts with individual customer segments and builds upward.
example.zh: 自下而上的分析从单个客户细分开始，逐步向上汇总。

example.en: Adjacency moves into related markets leverage existing capabilities.
example.zh: 向邻接市场的拓展能利用现有能力。

example.en: Once a feature is commoditized, it no longer serves as a differentiator.
example.zh: 一旦某功能商品化，它就不再是差异化因素。
